rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type scope when using concrete bounds or visible relations
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope hierarchy when inserting annex blocks
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), and implication =>
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit exposure
